mapper.select: select id, username, password, display_name, mobile, employee_no, org_id, team_id, status from sys_user where username = #{username}

select u.id, u.username, u.password, u.display_name, u.mobile, u.employee_no, u.org_id, o.org_name, u.team_id, t.team_name, u.status from sys_user u left join mes_system.md_org o on o.id = u.org_id left join mes_system.md_team t on t.id = u.team_id where u.username = #{username}
select r.role_code from sys_role r join sys_user_role ur on ur.role_id = r.id where ur.user_id = #{userId} and coalesce(r.status, '启用') not in ('停用', 'DISABLED')

select distinct p.permission_code from sys_permission p join sys_role_permission rp on rp.permission_id = p.id join sys_user_role ur on ur.role_id = rp.role_id join sys_role r on r.id = ur.role_id where ur.user_id = #{userId} and coalesce(r.status, '启用') not in ('停用', 'DISABLED')

where.if: and (u.username like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or u.display_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or u.employee_no like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
and exists (select 1 from sys_user_role ur_filter where ur_filter.user_id = u.id and ur_filter.role_id = #{roleId})

mapper.select:
select u.id, u.username, u.display_name, u.mobile, u.employee_no, u.org_id, o.org_name, u.team_id, t.team_name, u.status from sys_user u left join mes_system.md_org o on o.id = u.org_id left join mes_system.md_team t on t.id = u.team_id
order by u.id desc limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}

select u.id, u.username, u.password, u.display_name, u.mobile, u.employee_no, u.org_id, o.org_name, u.team_id, t.team_name, u.status from sys_user u left join mes_system.md_org o on o.id = u.org_id left join mes_system.md_team t on t.id = u.team_id where u.id = #{userId}
select r.id, r.role_code, r.role_name, r.status from sys_role r join sys_user_role ur on ur.role_id = r.id where ur.user_id = #{userId} order by r.role_code
select id, role_code, role_name, status from sys_role where coalesce(status, '启用') not in ('停用', 'DISABLED') order by role_code
mapper.insert: insert into sys_user(id, username, password, display_name, mobile, employee_no, org_id, team_id, status) values(#{user.id}, #{user.username}, #{user.password}, #{user.displayName}, #{user.mobile}, #{user.employeeNo}, #{user.orgId}, #{user.teamId}, #{user.status})
mapper.update: update sys_user set display_name = #{user.displayName}, mobile = #{user.mobile}, employee_no = #{user.employeeNo}, org_id = #{user.orgId}, team_id = #{user.teamId} where id = #{user.id}
update sys_user set status = #{status} where id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_user_role(id, user_id, role_id) values(#{id}, #{userId}, #{roleId})
mapper.select: select count(1) from sys_role where id in #{roleId} and coalesce(status, '启用') not in ('停用', 'DISABLED')
select count(1) from sys_user_role where role_id = #{roleId} and user_id != #{excludeUserId}
mapper.update: update sys_user set display_name = #{displayName}, mobile = #{mobile} where id = #{userId}
update sys_user set password = #{password} where id = #{userId}
